LanguageData.GameOverDaoAscensionIntro:
Under the QingMing tree, the ethereal fluff rises,
Ascend to immortality, reaching the ninth heaven.
Qi gathers, transforming the world,
Transcending the mundane, gaining freedom.

You have cast off the shackles of the mortal world and ascended to immortality. The vast universe before you is no longer distant, but a boundless realm awaiting your exploration. Titles like cultivator and immortal hold no meaning for you now. With Qi flowing like a river, every step you take is a journey beyond the mundane.
LanguageData.GameOverDaoAscensionEnding: After ascension, your remnants will remain in place, while the rest of your consciousness transforms into Qi, journeying towards the void.\n\nYou have not perished, but have become a life of another form—immortal.
LanguageData.NoHediff: not yet reached the Realm of Earth Immortal Ascension
